message:
feat(atc): unify tick+summary into atc_tick_report, enrich operator telemetry

Refactor the top-level atc_tick() into atc_tick_report() which returns
both the action list and a fully-populated AtcTickReport containing the
summary snapshot.  This eliminates the redundant atc_summary() call in
the operator loop and ensures the snapshot matches the tick that
produced it rather than racing a subsequent tick.

Enrich AtcSummarySnapshot and AtcOperatorSnapshot with stage_timings,
kernel, budget, and policy telemetry so the operator TUI and logs can
display mode, incumbent policy, and per-stage timing breakdowns.

Additional fixes:
- Extract floor_f64_to_u64() helper to replace bare `.floor() as u64`
  casts, handling NaN/negative/infinity safely.
- Mark agents dirty after calibration updates so schedule versions
  propagate without waiting for the next natural review.
- Add schedule_version and next_review_micros fields to test agent
  entries to match the expanded AgentEntry struct.
- Use live tick_budget_micros from the report instead of the static
  config value for budget-exceeded detection and logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
